comparison.C: control; runtime and raw native build pass; uv managed install fails on noncanonical project header; broad provenance replacement retained
comparison.H: header-only repair; all consumer paths pass; rejected as final because broad provenance replacement remains
comparison.M: upstream-preserved minimal overlay; runtime, uv system/managed, python-config, pkg-config, native build/install/import all pass
comparison.U: upstream metadata; runtime and uv managed paths pass; native wheel build fails on producer macOS NDK compiler path

rejected_profiles.C: uv managed install failure and noncanonical header
rejected_profiles.H: successful but retains overbroad synthetic producer metadata replacement
rejected_profiles.U: native wheel build uses unavailable producer NDK compiler path

selection_basis: overlays only measured consumer paths and Android on-device compiler policy
passes direct runtime, uv system, uv managed, python-config, pkg-config, and native wheel build/import probes
